label: Ideo icon
description: Defines an icon used to represent an ideology on the ideology screen. Inherits meme and culture filters from IdeoSymbolPartDef.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the ideology icon. Not translated - use the raw asset path. All shipped universal icons use the UI/Ideoligions/Universal/ prefix and specific icons use UI/Ideoligions/Specific/.

basic-icon.label: Basic icon
basic-icon.description: Minimal ideology icon with a def name and texture path.
